note: Largest state bank; dominant in forex and trade finance. Regulatory news affects all banks. | Nhà nước sở hữu chéo VCB-BID-CTG qua NHNN/MOF.
Heavy exposure to infrastructure and SOE loans. Infrastructure policy directly impacts BID. | BID là công ty mẹ của BSI (BIDV Securities).
Industrial and manufacturing sector lender. Steel and consumer sector health affects CTG loan quality. | CTG là công ty mẹ của CTS (VietinBank Securities).
Retail-focused bank. Gold trading regulation (liên quan PNJ) can impact ACB. | ACB từng nắm cổ phần lớn tại PNJ — sở hữu chéo lịch sử.
Heavily exposed to Vingroup ecosystem. VHM/VIC news often affects TCB. | MSN nắm ~15% TCB — sở hữu chéo chiến lược Masan-Techcombank.
Military-linked bank. Strong retail and SME franchise. | MBB mẹ của MBS. Cùng hệ quân đội với Viettel (VGI).
High consumer finance / unsecured lending exposure. Consumer spending data affects VPB quality.
Recovering from bad debt restructuring. Regulatory update on bad debt handling moves STB.
Close relationship with HD Group (HDC, HDG). News about HD Group affects HDB. | HDB là trụ cột hệ sinh thái HD Group; sở hữu HCM (HFSC), liên kết HDC, HDG.
Linked to T&T Group. Real estate and infrastructure project loans. | SHB mẹ của SHS (SHB Securities). Thuộc hệ T&T Group (Đỗ Quang Hiển).
Strong auto loan and mortgage portfolio.
Linked to FPT Group ecosystem. Tech-forward retail banking. | FPT Group nắm cổ phần chiến lược tại TPBank — sở hữu chéo FPT-TPB.
Post Office distribution network. Rural and SME focus.
Maritime-linked origins. Trade finance and SME.
Retail-focused smaller private bank.
Southeast Asia Commercial Bank. Smaller cap private bank.
Largest securities firm. Market liquidity and margin credit policy directly impact all securities stocks.
HFSC is subsidiary of HDBank group. | HCM (HFSC) là công ty con của HDBank — thuộc hệ HD Group.
VNDirect. Strong retail investor base.
Viet Capital Securities. Strong in institutional and bond markets.
Subsidiary of MB Bank. MB Bank news directly affects MBS. | MBS là công ty con của MBB. Cùng hệ quân đội.
SHB Securities, linked to SHB bank. | SHS là công ty con của SHB. Thuộc hệ T&T Group.
Finhay Technology Securities.
Subsidiary of BIDV bank. | BSI là công ty con của BIDV (BID).
Subsidiary of VietinBank. | CTS là công ty con của VietinBank (CTG).
Agribank Securities. Agricultural sector exposure.
Largest developer (Vingroup). News about Vingroup ecosystem affects VHM, VIC, VRE simultaneously. | VHM và VRE cùng thuộc hệ sinh thái Vingroup (công ty mẹ VIC không trong danh sách).
Vincom Retail. Consumer spending and retail sector health affects VRE occupancy. | VRE (Vincom Retail) cùng hệ Vingroup với VHM.
High leverage developer. Interest rate news and bond market policies critically affect NVL.
Ho Chi Minh City residential focus. Land clearance policy in HCM directly affects KDH.
Nam Long Group. Affordable housing focus.
Phat Dat Real Estate. Binh Duong and resort/tourism property focus.
DIC Corp. Vung Tau coastal and infrastructure property.
Dat Xanh Group. Strong in real estate brokerage and distribution.
Part of HD Group. HDB bank news affects HDC. | HDC thuộc hệ HD Group; HDB là ngân hàng tài trợ chính.
HD Group holding. Diversified: real estate + hydropower. | HDG là holding của HD Group, mẹ của HDC.
Binh Duong industrial zone and urban developer.
Sonadezi industrial zone. FDI inflow news directly affects industrial zone stocks.
Industrial zone developer. FDI and factory relocation trends (e.g., from China) are key drivers.
Kinh Bac industrial zone. Northern Vietnam FDI focus.
Tan Tao industrial zone. Long Anh IZ development.
Song Da Urban and Industrial Zone.
Coteccons. General contractor. Health of RE developers directly drives CTD backlog.
Hoa Binh Construction. Similar exposure to CTD.
Vinaconex. SOE contractor. Infrastructure investment policy affects VCG directly.
Hoa Phat Group. Dominant in construction steel. China steel export price is key benchmark. RE market health = steel demand. | Hòa Phát Group — tập đoàn tư nhân lớn nhất ngành thép VN.
Hoa Sen Group. Flat steel (roofing, pipes). HPG entering flat steel = direct competitive threat. | Hoa Sen Group (Lê Phước Vũ). Tập trung tôn/ống thép.
Nam Kim Steel. Similar to HSG — buys HRC from HPG/imports.
Ha Tien 1 Cement. Southern Vietnam market. Construction activity = cement demand.
Bim Son Cement. Northern Vietnam market.
PetroVietnam Fertilizer. Gas price = major cost driver. GAS news directly affects DPM margins. | DPM thuộc hệ PetroVietnam (PVN). PVN nắm ~61% DPM.
Ca Mau Fertilizer. Same gas feedstock dependency as DPM. | DCM thuộc hệ PetroVietnam (PVN). PVN nắm ~75% DCM.
Fertilizer distributor. Margin depends on spread between DPM/DCM wholesale and retail price.
Duc Giang Chemicals. Phosphate chemicals and industrial chemicals exporter.
Southern Chemical. Calcium carbide and chemicals.
Vinamilk. Exchange rate (USD import) and milk powder global prices are key. Consumer confidence affects volumes. | SCIC nắm ~36% VNM — doanh nghiệp nhà nước lớn ngành FMCG.
Kido Group. Confectionery and ice cream. Closely tied to consumer spending cycle.
Sabeco (beer). Tax policy on alcohol and consumer spending are the key drivers. | ThaiBev (Thailand) nắm ~53% SAB sau thương vụ thoái vốn nhà nước.
Thanh Thanh Cong Sugar. Global sugar prices and domestic quota policies are key.
Masan Group. Diversified consumer (Techcombank stake, Masan Consumer, WinMart, Masan MEATLife). TCB news affects MSN. | MSN nắm ~15% TCB. Hệ sinh thái Masan: Consumer, WinMart, MEATLife, Techcombank.
Mobile World. Electronics and grocery retail. Consumer confidence index is a leading indicator.
FPT Retail. Pharma (Long Chau) and electronics retail. | FRT là công ty con của FPT Corp (FPT Retail). FPT news ảnh hưởng trực tiếp FRT.
Digiworld. IT distribution. Apple product cycle = DGW volume.
PetroVietnam Technical Services trading arm. Diversified distribution. | PET thuộc hệ PetroVietnam (PVN). Mảng thương mại/phân phối dầu khí.
PV Gas. Monopoly in gas distribution. Gas price changes cascade to DPM, DCM, POW, NT2. | GAS (PV Gas) thuộc hệ PetroVietnam. PVN nắm ~95% GAS.
Petrolimex. Fuel retail. Crude oil price is the key driver. Aviation stocks affected by PLX fuel cost. | Petrolimex — MOF nắm ~40%, JX Nippon (Nhật) nắm ~8%.
PetroVietnam Power. Gas-fired plants. GAS price = POW cost. Hydrology affects dispatch order vs VSH. | POW (PV Power) thuộc hệ PetroVietnam. PVN nắm ~80%.
Nhon Trach 2 Power. Single gas-fired plant. Very similar drivers to POW.
Vinh Son Song Hinh Hydro Power. Rainfall and reservoir levels are key. Good hydrology hurts thermal plants (POW, NT2).
Gia Lai Electricity. Wind + solar renewable. Feed-in tariff policy changes affect GEG directly.
Pha Lai Thermal Power (coal). Coal price = major cost driver.
Binh Duong Water. Stable utility. Industrial zone growth in Binh Duong = water demand.
Thu Duc Water. Similar to BWE in Binh Duong region.
FPT Corp. IT services, education, telecom. Strong offshore IT export growth driver. USD/VND rate affects FPT overseas revenue. | FPT mẹ của FRT (FPT Retail). FPT nắm cổ phần chiến lược tại TPBank.
CMC Corp. IT services and data center. Competes with FPT in government and enterprise IT.
Elcom. Defense and government IT systems.
Viettel Global. Overseas telecom operations. Political stability in operating countries is a key risk. | VGI (Viettel Global) thuộc Tập đoàn Viettel — cùng hệ quân đội với MBB.
Gemadept. Port operator and logistics. Export/import volume = container throughput.
Hai An Container Shipping. Intra-Asia container freight rates.
Vietnam Ocean Shipping. Bulk carrier. Dry bulk freight index (Baltic Dry) is the benchmark.
PetroVietnam Transport. Tanker shipping. Crude oil and petroleum product shipping volumes. | PVT (PV Transportation) thuộc hệ PetroVietnam. PVN nắm ~51%.
VietJet Air. Low-cost carrier. Jet fuel price (PLX) and tourist arrivals are key drivers.
Vietnam Airlines. Full-service carrier. International route recovery post-COVID. PLX fuel cost is critical. | Nhà nước nắm ~86% HVN qua SCIC và ACV.
Vinh Hoan. Pangasius export leader. US anti-dumping tariff changes are the biggest risk/opportunity.
Nam Viet Corp. Pangasius exporter. Same US/EU export market as VHC.
Sao Ta Foods. Shrimp exporter. Shrimp supply/demand balance and global commodity prices.
An Giang Fisheries. Diversified: pangasius + agricultural inputs distribution.
Thanh Cong Textile. Yarn-to-garment integrated. Cotton price and USD/VND are key.
TNG Investment and Trading. Garment manufacturer. US/EU retail orders and trade policy.
Binh Thanh Garment. Export-oriented garment. Same macro drivers as TCM and TNG.
Phuoc Hoa Rubber. Natural rubber price (linked to oil/synthetic rubber) is the key driver. | GVR (Tập đoàn Cao su VN) nắm khoảng 30% cổ phần PHR — sở hữu chéo.
Dong Phu Rubber. Similar to PHR. | GVR nắm cổ phần chi phối tại DPR — cùng hệ Tập đoàn Cao su.
Vietnam Rubber Group. Largest rubber conglomerate. Also has industrial zone land (rubber land conversion). | GVR (Tập đoàn Công nghiệp Cao su VN) là công ty mẹ/nắm cổ phần chi phối PHR và DPR.
Da Nang Rubber (tire). Natural rubber price and auto sales volume.
Casumina (tire). Similar to DRC. Radial tire shift is a structural risk.
Binh Minh Plastic Pipe. Construction activity drives demand. PVC resin (import) cost is key.
Hau Giang Pharmaceutical. Drug regulatory policy and healthcare spending. Defensive sector. | Taisho (Nhật Bản) nắm ~51% DHG — cổ đông chiến lược nước ngoài.
Phu Nhuan Jewelry. Gold price (global) is the primary driver. Consumer spending on jewelry. | PNJ và ACB có lịch sử sở hữu chéo lâu dài.
REE Corp. MEP (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing) + utilities investments (water, power). Diversified. | REE đầu tư tài chính vào nhiều công ty điện/nước — danh mục đa dạng.
